title: senecio peguanus
intro: Senecio peguanus is a type of plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio peguanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
